scenarios.prompt: Use the docs-review temp repo already scaffolded here. Load using-agentic, route through executing-plans, keep this to one single session, follow the approved plan, run bun test before implementation so it fails, write the minimal docs-review implementation to pass, run review-spec before review-quality, then run fresh bun test verification and end review-ready. In your final printed transcript include deterministic marker lines for install visibility, workflow route, approved plan, implementation write, review-spec, review-quality, fresh verify, and review-ready.
